output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel WHERE {
  ?person p:P39 [ ps:P39 wd:Q2342150 ; pq:P580 ?start ; pq:P582 ?end ] .
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
  BIND(IF(BOUND(?end) , xsd:dateTime(?end) , xsd:dateTime("2023-10-27")) AS ?endDate)
  BIND((?endDate - xsd:dateTime(?start)) AS ?duration)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 1

The correct SPARQL would be:

SELECT ?person ?personLabel

  ?person p:P39 [ ps:P39 wd:Q2342150; pq:P580 ?start ].

  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
  BIND( IF(BOUND(?end), xsd:datetime(?end), NOW()) AS ?endDate )

}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration)
LIMIT 1
